ShortDescription.Value: Control the number of tourists in your city and customize building attractiveness.

Publish.LongDescription:
### Custom Tourism[ALPHA] Want more tourists in your city? Or fewer? Set a **target tourist count** and the mod handles the rest.
### Tourism Control Set exactly how many tourists you want in your city from the settings panel (Options → Custom Tourism → Tourism).
- Slider from 0 to 20,000 tourists - **0 = disabled** (vanilla behavior) - The mod gradually spawns or removes tourists to reach your target - Works independently from the game's built-in tourism formula
### Attractiveness Editor Customize the attractiveness of any building — landmarks, parks, tourist attractions, etc.
- Select any building with attractiveness and an **editor panel** appears - **Slider** to set attractiveness from 0 to 500 - One-click **Restore Default** to revert to vanilla values - Changes apply to **all buildings of the same type** - Overrides are **saved automatically** and persist across game restarts - To close the panel, click anywhere else
### Notes - Attractiveness changes take about **5 to 30 seconds** to show up in the tourism menu - Setting a very high tourist count may cause **performance issues** and unexpected behavior - This is an **alpha** mod — things may not work perfectly - For any feedback, bug reports, or suggestions, please visit the [forum thread](https://forum.paradoxplaza.com/forum/threads/customizeit.1917189/)
### Compatibility
- Safe to remove any time. Restore all overrides to default before uninstalling for clean vanilla values. - Does not use Harmony
### Languages
- English, French
### Credits
Thanks to **Honu / River-Mochi** from the Cities: Skylines modding Discord for their help
